basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) has officially announced the Associate Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates holding a Master's degree in Infrastructure Engineering and Management can submit their online applications on or before 18 July 2026. Applicants are advised to refer to the official notification for age limit details. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Infrastructure Engineering and Management
qualification.details: Master's degree in Infrastructure Engineering and Management

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Associate Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Associate Project Engineer post at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Associate Project Engineer position at IIT Guwahati is 18th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Infrastructure Engineering and Management to be eligible for the Associate Project Engineer role.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Associate Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Associate Project Engineer position announced by IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Associate Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 35,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online through the official IIT Guwahati website.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Associate Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selection process for this role will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITG/II&SI/Project Staff Rectt-2026/127.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Associate Project Engineer is on a contractual basis.
